name: NodeImport: Imbalanced Node Classification with Node Importance Assessment

description: arXiv:2607.13837v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: In real-world applications, node classification on graphs often faces the challenge of class imbalance, where majority classes dominate training, resulting in biased model performance. Traditional GNNs often struggle in such scenarios, as they tend to overfit to majority classes while underrepresenting minority classes. Existing solutions, which...
author: Nan Chen, Zemin Liu, Bryan Hooi, Bingsheng He, Jun Hu, Jia Chen
